programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Montana Muzzleloader Hunting for Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes on Montana’s week-long big game heritage season with a traditional muzzleloader. With flintlock in hand, Steve’s after mule deer in a desolate and broken sage brush landscape. After a long few months of evading hunters, these deer have perfected how to stay alive. But stalking a deer into range isn’t the only hurdle to navigate.

programme.title: MeatEater - Texas Turkey with Luke Combs
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the Yturria Ranch in south Texas, this time, to hunt turkeys and pigs with country musician Luke Combs. Their plans to chase the spring thunder shifts as the weather has a different idea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Welcome to Tanzania
programme.desc: Steven Rinella travels to Tanzania for his first African safari with professional hunter, Morgan Potter. In this episode, Morgan and his team show Steve the ropes of hunting in this foreign terrain for otherworldly big game species. Steve's quest for a cape buffalo moves to the side burner when the team discovers an impressive roan antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: MeatEater - The New American Food Chain: Wild Pigs
programme.desc: On this trip, Steve travels to the Sacramento Valley in central California in search of a new challenge.

programme.title: MeatEater - Brotherhood, Badlands, and Pack Llamas: Montana Mule Deer
programme.desc: With a trio of cantankerous, spit-hurling pack llamas, Steven heads out.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Roughest Country: Texas Aoudad Sheep
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountainous desert backcountry of west Texas after Barbary sheep, or Aoudad. These introduced sheep from North Africa are hard to find and harder to hunt. Challenged by the harsh environment, rugged terrain, and elusive sheep, Steve finds this hunt to be one of the most difficult he has ever undertaken.

programme.title: MeatEater - Canyon Bottoms and Cookouts: Texas Javelina
programme.desc: Steven Rinella takes to the canyons of the West Texas desert in search of javelina. In this broken, rocky terrain finding these unique critters isn't easy and getting a clear shot on a skunk pig with a bow is a whole other story. But Steve is inspired by the evidence of he finds of ancient hunters that used the area to prepare a meal that honors both the animal and our hunting ancestors.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Bucks and Small Game: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to Wisconsin to spend a few days on his buddys historical family farm to hunt small game.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: Das Boat - Great Lakes Salvation
programme.desc: In the Das Boat Northeast finale, Joe Cermele takes the helm again, this time on Lake Erie.

programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Miles Nolte travel to Minnesota to try to catch big mouth buffalo.

programme.title: Yuliana Samboní
programme.desc: "The series, hosted by Univision news anchor Ilia Calderón, revisits harrowing cases that shocked the public. Through the accounts of victims' families, expert analysis, and journalists, the show unravels the contributing factors and warning signs that ultimately led to each tragic event. With access to personal images, videos, and locations related to the victims and their perpetrators, viewers are taken on a journey into the heart-wrenching stories."

programme.title: El regreso de Luis
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvia que sea su novia, Pedro lo convence de ser mejor persona y así conseguir su amor. Los López Pérez regresan a vivir al edificio y Germán les tiene a todos una sorpresa.

programme.title: Primera cita
programme.desc: Magdalena es la nueva jefa de seguridad y, debido a los robos en el edificio, instala cámaras con la ayuda de Germán. Silvita y Luisito tienen su primera cita.

programme.title: El cumple de Silvia
programme.desc: Silvia cumple años y aconsejan a Luis que no la felicite para llamar su atención. Los López Pérez no encuentran a Morris por ningún lado y sospechan que se ha ido de la casa.

programme.title: Luis pobretón
programme.desc: Luis se ha quedado sin trabajo, por lo que buscará una nueva actividad para invitar a Silvia a salir. Por otro lado, Luismi ha llegado solo al edificio.

programme.title: La novia de Pedro
programme.desc: Pedro invita a salir a Cris, la mejor amiga de Silvia, y organiza una cita doble con Luis y Silvita. La alcaldía instala una cámara de fotomultas y los flashazos apuntan directo al edificio.

programme.title: En una relación
programme.desc: Después de un tiempo de salir juntos, Luis le pregunta a Silvia qué son y quiere que se decida de una vez. La alcaldía instala lámparas de led en el alumbrado público y la no deja dormir a los vecinos.

programme.title: Beso fallido
programme.desc: Luis invita a Silvia a ver una película a su casa, pero Pedro interrumpirá su romántico momento, pues quiere recuperar su tele. Por otra parte, Arturo jugará póker con Germán, Jorjais y Benito.

programme.title: Las pantuflas de Luis
programme.desc: Luis y Pedro hacen una apuesta para saber si se dice pantuflas o pantunflas y le preguntarán a todos los vecinos. Lorena sospecha que Benito está molesto por su nuevo galán.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: El niño y la niebla
programme.desc: Marta (Dolores del Río) es una mujer que vive obsesionada, ya que su madre y su hermano murieron de esquizofrenia. Temerosa de que la enfermedad sea congénita, sobreprotege hasta el extremo a su único hijo (Alejandro Ciangherotti Jr.). Debido a su obsesión, Marta no se da cuenta que la única afectada psicológicamente en su familia es ella.

programme.title: Escuela de valientes
programme.desc: An early 1960s Mexican western in the vaquero style. Recently widowed ranch owner Gabriela Bermúdez is facing trouble from neighboring haciendado Don Atenor. Her aunt, Tia Lola, tells her this is why she should remarry and Gabriela reluctantly accepts the notion. She decides he should be ranch savvy and strong and goes to the town fair to peruse the bravado and deeds of the macho men hanging out. Agustin and his buddy El Tigre provide comic relief, as Tigre falls in love with Gabriela, though he is not really her type. Madly in love he tries to impress her in increasingly comic situations, eventually taking on the guise of a gun runner to seem more worldly and able to handle situations. Director Julian Soler does a good job of balancing the light and serious sides of the movie making the production an enjoyable example of early 1960s Mexican vaquero movies. The tradition of the American cowboy, is the subject matter of countless Hollywood movies. But those movies have never dealt with the true origins with the Mexican "vaquero" whose traditions were adapted to create the iconic American "Cowboy", originally a truly Mexican tradition.

programme.title: Formality
programme.desc: While struggling with family secrets, Allison (Crystal Reed) focuses on the Winter Formal dance. Meanwhile, as the tensions between werewolves and hunters rise to a boiling point, Scott (Tyler Posey) struggles to protect both friends and enemies.

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In the season finale, Scott McCall (Tyler Posey) discovers one last clue which allows him to enlist both friends -- and even a previous enemy -- in order to stop the mysterious killings and win back Allison (Crystal Reed), the girl he loves.

programme.title: Omega
programme.desc: When Lydia (Holland Roden) goes missing from the hospital, werewolves and hunters alike begin a search to discover not only where she is, but what she may have become. Meanwhile Jackson's (Colton Haynes) body seems to be fighting against the bite.

programme.title: Shape Shifted
programme.desc: The night before a full moon, Isaac's father (John Wesley Shipp) is murdered. When Isaac (Daniel Sharman) is arrested, Scott (Tyler Posey), Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) and Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) resolve to break him out before the Argents get to him.

programme.title: Ice Pick
programme.desc: Scott (Tyler Posey) tries to stop Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) from creating new werewolves, while Chris Argent (JR Bourne) decides to officially begin Allison's (Crystal Reed) training. Meanwhile, the new creature in Beacon Hills takes another victim.

programme.title: Abomination
programme.desc: When the shapeshifter strikes again, Scott (Tyler Posey) has to recruit a reluctant Allison (Crystal Reed) to acquire a rare book from Gerard's (guest star Michael Hogan) collection, while also once again surviving dinner with the Argents.

programme.title: Venomous
programme.desc: Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) becomes convinced that Lydia (Holland Roden) is the shapeshifter they're after since she seemed immune to its toxin, forcing Scott (Tyler Posey) to gather his friends -- and even some enemies -- to protect her.

programme.title: Frenemy
programme.desc: With startling new information about the shapeshifter, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) hurry to protect their friends while Allison (Crystal Reed) is given an investigative task by her family. And there is "panic at the disco."

programme.title: Restraint
programme.desc: Lydia (Holland Roden) makes connections about the bite from Peter (Ian Bohen). Jackson (Colton Haynes) causes problems for Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) while Derek (Tyler Hoechlin) has a crisis of faith in his leadership abilities.

programme.title: Raving
programme.desc: During a secret concert, Scott (Tyler Posey) and Stiles (Dylan O'Brien) come up with a method to trap the new shapeshifter. At the same time, Allison's mother (Eaddy Mays) comes up with a plan of her own to take care of Scott once and for all.

programme.title: Birthright
programme.desc: An environmentally friendly U.S. Senator's life changes when, after a freak accident, he suddenly starts to believe he is an alien in disguise, with a "mission" to surreptitiously reconfigure the Earth's atmosphere. But is it for the better?

programme.title: Voice Of Reason
programme.desc: Randall Strong (Gordon Clapp) is on a mission to convince the US Military that aliens are threatening Earth, but committee Chairman Thornwell (Daniel J. Travanti) seems to be Strong's biggest stumbling block. Could Thornewll be one of... "them"?

programme.title: A Stitch In Time
programme.desc: FBI agent Jamie Pratt (Michelle Forbes) investigates a perplexing case when her best friend becomes a killer's next victim. The mystery takes her through five decades of time, where reality changes at each and every turn...in the Outer Limits.

programme.title: Resurrection
programme.desc: Life on Earth has been wiped out by biological warfare, with androids the only survivors. Two such androids (Heather Graham, Dana Ashbrook) recreate a human from DNA and must protect him from a military force which wants humankind annihilated.

programme.title: Unnatural Selection
programme.desc: Howard (Alan Ruck) and Joanne (Catherine Mary Stewart) are happily expecting their first child. They live in a world where genetic alteration is rampantly purchased on the black market...but nothing comes without a price in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: I Hear You Calling
programme.desc: After intercepting a strange phone call, a tenacious reporter (Ally Sheedy) finds herself in a deadly game of cat and mouse. The only clues to the mystery: a strange man with violet eyes and missing persons who leave behind a pile of purple ash.

programme.title: Mind Over Matter
programme.desc: When an accident puts Dr. Stein's (Mark Hamill) colleague, Rachel, in a coma, he uses his newly-created invention to reach her brain and tell her he loves her. However, Stein discovers that love takes strange turns when it enters the virtual world.

programme.title: Beyond The Veil

programme.title: First Anniversary

programme.desc: Family attends an old woman's funeral.

programme.title: Ultrasound
programme.desc: Vanessa's ultrasound.

programme.title: Marathon
programme.desc: Jay trains for the marathon.

programme.title: While Out
programme.desc: Claire throws a wild party.

programme.title: Michael's Band
programme.desc: Michael's former bandmate comes to town.

programme.title: Mike's Problem
programme.desc: Mike is all stressed out with upcoming exams leaving him impotent and frustrated. Gloria encourages him to discuss it with her, but he refuses. Gloria confides in Edith what the problem is, and in turn she tells Archie. This leads Archie to enter the situation, trying to give Mike advice, but this just makes matters worse.

programme.title: The Blockbuster
programme.desc: The Bunkers are having problems with their furnace which gets Archie entertaining the idea of possibly moving to California. When an unscrupulous black real-estate salesman, Mr. Byrd, offers Archie a hefty sum of money for his home, Archie is all for it despite Mike's warnings that Byrd is a blockbuster (someone who persuades white home-owners to sell by appealing to the fear that minority groups will move into the neighborhood causing property values to decline).

programme.title: The Insurance Is Cancelled
programme.desc: Archie comes home from work in a particularly awful mood because he has to make an important decision at work: whether to lay off a minority worker or a white man. His decision to lay off a Puerto Rican leads to an interesting visit to the Bunker household. To compound his stress, Archie learns that his insurance has been canceled when his neighborhood is redlined as a bad risk.

programme.title: Christmas Day At The Bunkers
programme.desc: It's Christmas Day and Archie is the only one not in the Christmas spirit. Mike and Gloria question him, but he refuses to reveal what's bugging him. The Jeffersons come over to wish the Bunkers a "Merry Christmas", but this does anything but cheer Archie up especially since Henry is dressed as Santa.

programme.title: The Man In The Street
programme.desc: Archie comes home from work in a great mood and orders Edith to have dinner ready and waiting, because he has an important date to watch the CBS Evening News to see himself on it. Apparently, Archie was interviewed as a man-on-the-street voicing his opinions on Nixon's presidency. However, getting to see himself proves to be difficult for him, when the TV breaks down.

programme.title: Cousin Maude's Visit
programme.desc: Edith has been running herself ragged caring for Archie, Mike and Gloria, who have all come down with a terrible flu. This prompts her to call on her extremely liberal Cousin Maude to come and stay with the Bunkers and help out. Maude proves to be salt in an already open wound for Archie, who has never liked Maude and vice versa.

programme.title: Edith's Problem
programme.desc: Archie, Mike and Gloria are stunned when Edith becomes a rollercoaster of moods, going from joy to anger to tears in a snap of a finger. Gloria sits her down and suggests that perhaps she's beginning menopause. This worries Edith, who becomes convinced that Archie doesn't love her and find her attractive anymore. Meanwhile, the family tries to cope with Edith.

programme.title: The Elevator Story
programme.desc: The Bunkers are celebrating Edith's birthday at an Italian restaurant in the city when Archie discovers that Edith failed to mail out a payment to the insurance company. This leads him to run across the street to drop it off. However, on his way he gets stuck in an elevator along with a pregnant Puerto Rican and her husband, an aging hippie, and an erudite black businessman.

programme.title: Archie And The Fbi
programme.desc: A man shows up at the Bunker's door claiming to be a government agent and begins asking questions about Larry Grundy, a neighbor of the Bunkers. Archie soon becomes paranoid when he receives a phone call from a neighbor saying that Archie too is being investigated. As paranoia overwhelms him, Archie becomes convinced that he's being watched that perhaps the house is bugged.

programme.title: Archie Sees A Mugging
programme.desc: Archie and Mike head down to the store to get some items and on the way out Archie witnesses a mugging. Archie doesn't want to get involved in the matter and refuses to tell the police what he saw. However, when he is forced to get involved, he embellishes his story, citing that the mugging was an attempted mafia hit.

programme.title: Mike's Mysterious Son
programme.desc: Edith answers the door to find a woman on the stoop with a young boy. The woman casually mentions that she's dropping Mike's son off and promptly leaves. Edith now finds herself in the awkward position of explaining to the rest of the family where the boy came from. When he finds out, a stunned Mike doesn't know what to say, but does admit to Gloria that he had been intimate with the boy's mother.

programme.title: Archie & Edith Alone
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria go away for eight days to spend some time in a commune, leaving Archie and Edith to spend some quality time together. Archie and Edith settle down for a quiet game of cards but when she lets him win, Archie insults her and they get into a big fight. Edith refuses to forgive Archie until he apologizes.

programme.title: Edith Gets A Mink
programme.desc: Edith gets a package in the mail and discovers that it is a mink cape sent to her as a 'thank you' gift by her Cousin Amelia for Edith taking care of her after a surgery. When Archie sees the cape, he is furious (since he takes it the wrong way) and demands that she give it back. However, that's when the cape is ruined in an accident and Archie sees a chance to make a three-hundred-dollar profit.

programme.title: El niño y la niebla
programme.desc: Marta (Dolores del Río) es una mujer que vive obsesionada, ya que su madre y su hermano murieron de esquizofrenia. Temerosa de que la enfermedad sea congénita, sobreprotege hasta el extremo a su único hijo (Alejandro Ciangherotti Jr.). Debido a su obsesión, Marta no se da cuenta que la única afectada psicológicamente en su familia es ella.

programme.title: Escuela de valientes
programme.desc: An early 1960s Mexican western in the vaquero style. Recently widowed ranch owner Gabriela Bermúdez is facing trouble from neighboring haciendado Don Atenor. Her aunt, Tia Lola, tells her this is why she should remarry and Gabriela reluctantly accepts the notion. She decides he should be ranch savvy and strong and goes to the town fair to peruse the bravado and deeds of the macho men hanging out. Agustin and his buddy El Tigre provide comic relief, as Tigre falls in love with Gabriela, though he is not really her type. Madly in love he tries to impress her in increasingly comic situations, eventually taking on the guise of a gun runner to seem more worldly and able to handle situations. Director Julian Soler does a good job of balancing the light and serious sides of the movie making the production an enjoyable example of early 1960s Mexican vaquero movies. The tradition of the American cowboy, is the subject matter of countless Hollywood movies. But those movies have never dealt with the true origins with the Mexican "vaquero" whose traditions were adapted to create the iconic American "Cowboy", originally a truly Mexican tradition.

programme.title: A Girl For Drobny
programme.desc: Lisa worries about Drobny the duck when the water fowl stops eating and sleeping and suffers headaches. Eb suggests the duck needs a duck girlfriend. Lisa agrees and goes about town trying to the right partner for Drobny.

programme.title: The Carpenter's Ball
programme.desc: Oliver refuses to take Lisa to the annual Carpenter's Ball because he thinks the attendees are too eccentric for his liking. But Lisa has her own motives to attend. She is trying to get a romance sparked between two local singles.

programme.title: Lisa, The Psychologist
programme.desc: When Oliver decides to attend night school and enrolls in a farming class, Lisa does the same, taking psychology. Before long, many of the residents of Hooterville are lining up for appointments with the eminent Dr. Lisa.

programme.title: Hawaiian Honeymoon
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The "sweet" surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: The Ex-Secretary
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Oliver Buys A Farm
programme.desc: In this classic series' premiere episode, New York City attorney Oliver Wendell Douglas (Eddie Albert) satisfies his desire for the simple life by buying a farm, much to the chagrin of his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor). John Charles Daly narrates the tale!

programme.title: Lisa's First Day On The Farm
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) brings his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor), to their new home, a ramshackle farm near Hooterville, just outside of Pixley, where she gets to meet the town's oddball residents. Bea Benaderet, Edgar Buchanan and Frank Cady guest star!

programme.title: The Decorator
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) is ready to get farming, but Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts her foot down and says she will leave unless they can hire a decorator to fix the house! Meanwhile, Kate Bradley (Bea Benaderet) teaches Lisa how to make "hotscakes."

programme.title: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Is the Honeymoon period over already? The rumor mill has it that Lisa (Eva Gabor) has packed up and left Oliver (Eddie Albert). Actually, she went back to New York to close up their penthouse apartment. And Mr. Haney is up to his old tricks!

programme.title: My Husband The Rooster Renter
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) calls in a roofer, a plumber and agricultural expert Hank Kimball (Alvy Moore). All of them give the same appraisal of his farm: it's a disaster! Meanwhile, Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) has a few chickens he'd like to rent out!

programme.title: Furniture, Who's Got The Furniture?
programme.desc: The Douglases are awaiting the arrival of their furniture and they don't know it, but Oliver's mother is on her way, too. But when the furniture is accidentally delivered to Mr. Haney's new place, he tries to sell their own possession back to them.

programme.title: Neighborliness
programme.desc: Planting season ends in three weeks and Oliver has yet to get his land plowed. Meanwhile, Uncle Joe (Edgar Buchanan) needs a new shotgun before duck hunting season starts and schemes to solve both of their problems...without Oliver knowing it.

programme.title: Lisa, The Helpmate
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) sends a sample of his soil to the State Scientific College, a report comes back that his farm contains ingredients never before found in soil. Could his soil problems just be cosmetic? Eleanor Audley guest stars.

programme.title: You Can't Plug In A 2 With A 6
programme.desc: Relying on statistics provided by the Department of Agriculture, Oliver (Eddie Albert) decides to plant wheat. But when he goes to Drucker's to buy seed, he learns the other farmers have a unique way to predict the best crop�Mrs. Ziffel's lumbago.

programme.title: Don't Call Us, We'll Call You
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a riff between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Parity Begins At Home
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) plants his entire 160 acres with wheat, only to hear from The Crabwell Corners Conservation and Stabilization Committee, a local farm organization, that he was only permitted to grow eight acres of wheat�because of Mr. Haney.

programme.title: Lisa Has A Calf
programme.desc: The cow that Oliver (Eddie Albert) bought from Mr. Haney is pregnant. Afraid that Haney will claim the new calf, Oliver and Eb decide to keep it secret...only to have the people of Hooterville think that it is Lisa (Eva Gabor) who is expecting!

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: Morticia, The Breadwinner
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family And The Spaceman
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: My Son, The Chimp
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: Morticia's Favorite Charity
programme.desc: Moriticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: Progress And The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Toupee
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: Cousin Itt And The Vocational Counselor
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: Lurch, The Teenage Idol
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Winning Of Morticia Addams
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight, members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: My Fair Cousin Itt
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 1)
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: Morticia's Romance (Part 2)
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: Morticia Meets Royalty
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: Gomez, The People's Choice
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: Cousin Itt's Problem
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.
